title: Colors
description: Learn colors through the world around you — and use them to describe yourself and others

scenarios.situation: The traffic light turns červená. What does that tell you to do?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Červená = Red = Stop. Slovak traffic lights follow the same sequence as everywhere — červená (red) stop, žltá (yellow) slow down, zelená (green) go.

scenarios.situation: You are looking for a pharmacy. You know their signs are always the same color as grass. Which color are you looking for?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Zelená = Green. All pharmacy (lekáreň) signs in Slovakia are green with a cross. Now you can spot them at a glance.

scenarios.situation: It is a clear summer day. You look up. The sky is the same color as the sea. Which Slovak color word describes it?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Modrá = Blue — the color of the sky and the sea on a clear day. Also the color of the EU Blue Card (Modrá karta).

scenarios.situation: You lost your bag. The police ask for the color. It is the color of night. What do you say?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Čierna = Black — the color of night. Taška = bag. Čierna taška = black bag. Always give the color immediately when reporting lost property.

scenarios.situation: The police are writing a report about a missing person. You describe their eyes — the same color as the sky. What do you say?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Modré oči = Blue eyes — same color as the sky. Oči = Eyes (plural) from the Body Parts lesson. Color + body part = a complete description.

scenarios.situation: You are describing a suspect to the police. Their hair is the color of coffee. What do you say?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Hnedé vlasy = Brown hair — the color of coffee or earth. Vlasy = hair from the Body Parts lesson.

scenarios.situation: An important letter arrives from the Foreign Police. The envelope is the color of snow. Which color is it?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Biela = White — the color of snow. Official correspondence in Slovakia typically comes in white envelopes. When you see a biela obálka in your mailbox — open it, it is important.

scenarios.situation: The traffic light turns žltá. What does that mean for drivers?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Žltá = Yellow. At a traffic light it means slow down — červená (red/stop) is coming next. The full sequence: zelená (go) → žltá (slow down) → červená (stop).

items.translation: The traffic light is ___. I must stop.

items.sentence: Lekáreň má ___ kríž. Ľahko ju nájdete.
items.translation: The pharmacy has a ___ cross. You will find it easily.
She has ___ eyes and blonde hair.

items.sentence: Stratil som ___ tašku pri autobusovej zastávke.
items.translation: I lost a ___ bag at the bus stop.
The sky is ___ today. It will not rain.
I have ___ hair and green eyes.
